name: Morale / Mood
summary: Players see a single morale bar; the data splits it across psychological stats — Achievement, Esteem, Meaning, etc. Each is drained by work and refilled by free-time activities.
modderHint: Work drain lives in loot/CONDTick1HourWorkMoods (-StatAchievement -StatEsteem -StatMeaning); refill in loot/CONDTick1HourFreeMoods.

name: Achievement
summary: Sense-of-personal-achievement stat. Drained 8.33/hr by work; refilled by free-time activities.

name: Self-esteem
summary: Self-worth stat. Drained 8.33/hr by work; refilled by free-time activities.

name: Meaning / Purpose
summary: Sense-of-purpose stat. Drained 4.17/hr by work; refilled by free-time activities.

name: Work-tick mood drain
summary: Tick-effect Loot entry that fires once per work-hour, draining StatAchievement / StatEsteem / StatMeaning.

name: Free-time-tick mood refill
summary: Tick-effect Loot entry that refills the work-drained psychological stats during free time. Pairs with CONDTick1HourWorkMoods.
